'''Meeks Fees''' was wanted dead by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for betraying him. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was worth 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and it was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
